trait.name: Wild Gamble
trait.effect: Once a round, instead of rolling the effect die, you can flip a lucky coin instead. Tails count as a 1, and heads count as a six. Flipping a coin doesn't count as rolling a die.

basicAttack.name: Wind's Kiss
basicAttack.effect:
Effect 1
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
On hit haste.
Effect 1.

limitBreak.name: Hot Streak
limitBreak.effect:
You flip aether-infused coins, drawing on the power of chance to explosive results.
Effect immediately gain and may flip up to 3 lucky coins, one at a time in sequence. Each time, you must choose a foe in range to be the target. You can target the same foe more than once. Flipping a coin is optional.
• First coin: Heads: 2d6+4 damage and you may flip the second coin. Tails, and end this ability.
• Second coin: Heads: 2d6+4 damage and you may flip the third coin. Tails effect, and end this ability.
• Third coin: 4d6+4 damage, burst 2 area effect centered on your target (save for half) Tails explode with the same effect, for 2d6+4 damage (save for half).
Then, gain any coins you didn't flip. You can use them any time, ignoring the 1/round limit on lucky coins.

keywords.name: Gambit
keywords.description: Roll the effect die and immediately gain the listed effect, usually with a negative effect on a lower die. Unlike other effects, gambits are optional, and effects are not cumulative.
